data.title: Community News: Mint Blockchain airdrop token check link is now online
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to feedback from community members, the official airdrop check link of Mint Blockchain has been launched, and users can open the NFT box to view the specific number of MINT token airdrops.
Previously, Mint Blockchain received a strategic investment of US$1.35 million (750,000 OP) from the Optimism Foundation in October 2024.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description: According to PANews, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $267 million over the past 24 hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $180 million, while short positions saw liquidations of $86.74 million. Bitcoin experienced total liquidations of $94.01 million, and Ethereum saw liquidations amounting to $41.67 million.

data.title: Kraken: Despite huge risks, US crypto investors are still investing heavily in Memecoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to a report released by the cryptocurrency exchange Kraken, American crypto investors are still investing heavily in Memecoin, even though this digital asset has huge risks. Kraken's survey of American crypto holders showed that 85% of respondents said they invested in Memecoins, of which 76% of investors believed that "the potential returns are worth the risk." The survey also pointed out that 44% of crypto holders believe that Memecoins will enhance the credibility of the crypto market, while 42% expect Memecoins to outperform other cryptocurrencies in 2025. The survey also showed that 29% of Memecoin holders said short-term gains were the main reason for their purchase of these cryptocurrencies, and 23% said diversification was their motivation for investment. (Coindesk)

data.title: Polymarket: Will work with UMA and EigenLayer to upgrade the platform with the next generation of oracles
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Polymarket published an article on the X platform saying that it has entered a new era of news and will upgrade through the next generation of oracles, which will be launched in cooperation with UMA and EigenLayer.

data.title: US SEC confirms receipt of spot Litecoin ETF application submitted by CoinShares
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has officially confirmed that it has accepted the spot Litecoin ETF (LITE) application submitted by CoinShares. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: SEC Accepts CoinShares' Spot Litecoin ETF Application
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has officially confirmed the acceptance of CoinShares' application for a spot Litecoin ETF (LITE).

data.title: 21Shares Strategy Director: LIBRA Scandal Marks the Peak of Meme Coin Craze
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News 21Shares Strategy Director Eliézer Ndinga posted on the X platform that the LIBRA token scandal marked the peak of the Meme coin craze, prompting the need for stronger risk management measures on the Launchpad platform. At the same time, global regulatory clarity is crucial - especially about government officials launching their own Meme coins. While permissionless innovation should be open to everyone, guardrails must be established to protect consumers and prevent scams. For example, automated systems can mark contract addresses previously involved in Rug to help investors avoid fraudulent activities.

data.title: Kyrgyzstan rejects CBDC in favor of gold-backed stablecoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Kyrgyzstan rejects central bank digital currency (CBDC) and turns to support gold-backed stablecoins. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Libra Token Scandal Highlights Need For Stronger Risk Management
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 19, 21Shares' Head of Strategy, Ξliézer Ndinga, commented on social media that the Libra token scandal marks a pivotal peak in the meme coin craze, underscoring the necessity for more robust risk management measures on launchpad platforms. Ndinga emphasized the critical importance of global regulatory clarity, particularly concerning government officials launching their own meme coins. While permissionless innovation should be accessible to everyone, safeguards must be established to protect consumers and prevent fraud. For instance, automated systems could flag contract addresses previously involved in rug pulls, aiding investors in avoiding fraudulent activities.

data.title: Kyrgyzstan Shifts Focus To Gold-Backed Stablecoin Over CBDC
data.description: According to Odaily, Kyrgyzstan has decided against adopting a central bank digital currency (CBDC) and is instead turning its attention to supporting a stablecoin backed by gold. This move reflects the country's strategic pivot towards leveraging gold reserves to stabilize its digital currency initiatives.
